violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (tomato slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC washed/sanitized. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025

Liquid egg whites were observed held at 54 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC placed egg whites in cooler for active cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. PIC labeled during inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the slicer have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and/or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2024
The hand-washing sink in the front kitchen area and restroom were lacking proper hand-washing signage. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025

The following food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils were observed with an accumulation of food and debris: - tomato slicer, - deli slicer, - knives, - can opener. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC washed/sanitized items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025
Inspector observed container of cheese past the 7 day date marking. PIC disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025

Containers of pooled eggs were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. PIC dated on site. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025

Working containers of ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025

Various food and beverage items were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen area and walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. PIC relocated items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. PIC removed/washed/sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025
Cleaned and sanitized equipment and utensils are not stored inverted. PIC fixed scoops and utensils. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025
Plastic containers were observed stacked together without proper airdrying. PIC washed/sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025
Inspector observed ice bins draining into a containers. Drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2024
Chemical spray bottles were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2024

Sanitizer bucket was stored with food, equipment, utensils, or single service items(on top of prep unit). Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back hallway, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the beverage cooler have an accumulation of food residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2024
Inspector observed a missing nozzle on ice bin causing leakage. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2024
